step_rationale: Metoprolol-regulated therapeutic target; creatine-synthesis enzyme, neurohormonal axis.
mechanism: GATM regulates creatine biosynthesis; metoprolol-induced changes modulate cardiac energetics and remodeling post-MI.

references.title: Metabolomic profiling of metoprolol-induced cardioprotection in a murine model of acute myocardial ischemia.
